zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Stirling於1338年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯時，她的父親John Stirling39歲，母親Barbara Swinburne34歲。她於大約1358年與Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk在英國蘇格蘭安格斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1378年在她的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Stirling于1338年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯时，她的父亲John Stirling39岁，母亲Barbara Swinburne34岁。她于大约1358年与Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk在英国苏格兰安格斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1378年在她的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stirling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): habitational name from Stirling (Stirlingshire), earlier Scots Strivilin (or similar), a name of uncertain etymology. It is recorded in the 12th century as Strevelin, and is perhaps from a river name. This surname is also common in northern Ireland (Antrim and Derry).

variants.name: Sterling
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Starling, Sterling (Old English Stærling), itself from the bird-name, whose use as a nickname may also be another source of the surname. Compare Stare 2.
German: from Middle High German sterlinc, the name of a coin, hence probably a nickname for someone who paid that amount in rent.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Stirling was born in 1338, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Stirling, was 39 and her mother, Barbara Swinburne, was 34. She married Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk about 1358, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1378, in her hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Stirling est née en 1338, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stirling, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Barbara Swinburne, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk environ 1358, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1378, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Stirling 1338 in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Stirling 39 und ihre Mutter Barbara Swinburne 34. Sie hat um 1358 in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1378 im Alter von 40 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Stirling è nata il nel 1338 nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Stirling, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Barbara Swinburne, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk circa 1358, nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1378, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Stirlingが1338年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで生まれた時，父John Stirlingは39歳，母Barbara Swinburneは34歳であった。約1358年にイギリススコットランドアンガスでAlexander Lindsay - Lord Gleneskと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1378年に故郷で40歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Stirling(이)가 1338년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stirling(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barbara Swinburne(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1358년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1378년 그녀의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Stirling nasceu em 1338, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Stirling, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Swinburne, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk aproximadamente 1358, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1378, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Stirling родилась в 1338 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Stirling было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Swinburne, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk около 1358 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1378 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Stirling nació en 1338, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Stirling, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Barbara Swinburne, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Alexander Lindsay - Lord Glenesk aproximadamente 1358, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1378, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
